done_summary:
Successfully extracted all 20 fields from the Veridyne Networks Q3 FY2026 press release into `/workspace/extraction_results.json`. 

Key results:
- All 20 schema fields were found and extracted with correct types (string, integer, number, date)
- All values are in the documented units (USD millions, percent, etc.)
- Date fields are in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
- No uncertain fields — all values were directly stated in the press release
- Notable extractions: $187.4M total revenue (38% YoY growth), $9.8M non-GAAP operating income, 4,117 total customers, $710M ARR, 1,847 FTEs, $115M Stitchwise acquisition, $722-$726M FY2026 revenue guidance, $200M share repurchase authorization

Also produced `/workspace/notes.md` documenting extraction decisions for each field.
